calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sara Taylor, via ZOOM, for Diana Kotik, via ZOOM, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying counsel and Ms. Kotik regarding the unauthorized distribution of estate funds to Ms. Kotik. Counsel reports that her client was unaware that she required court approval prior to accessing the estate funds. Ms. Kotik reports that she believed that she had access to the estate funds once all creditors had been paid. Both counsel and Ms. Kotik provide additional oral testimony to support the petition. The court thanks counsel and Ms. Kotik for their testimony and advises that it is reluctantly taking the matter under submission.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
